name: Forsaken (School Edition)
description:
"W̴̱̔̑ḛ̸̈́l̶̯̟̓c̴̼̏͝ơ̵̘ṃ̸͔͛e̷͓͖͗ ̸̘͈̉̉t̷̙́̍ő̶̳͝ ̴̢̟́ḿ̴͕̞y̴͖̮̾̕ ̴̣͛ị̴̏̋n̶̫͈̓s̵̰͎͊̔t̸̘̃͛ĭ̷̢̙ṱ̴͎͠ụ̸͛ť̵͍ͅi̵̥͆ȏ̷̲͉͘ǹ̶̫͇.̶̨̏͋ ̵͔̋̎B̶̮̠̃̀e̸͎̒̾h̴̛͈͔̀a̴͉͊͆v̶̜̯͐ȩ̴͚͌̚ ̵̢̪̄̀o̴͖̅r̴͍̬̀͂ ̷̬̪͂ẹ̷͈̎ĺ̸͈̂s̸̢̫̋̀ë̵̡́̀.̴͖͖̄̏" -The Spectre
Forsaken (Roblox) University AU
28 Characters.

Welcome to the world of Robloxia University!
Here, everyone can either be your friend or enemy. But most importantly, you can do whatever you want.
Be another student? No problem!
Be a teacher? No problem!
Be a fellow staff member? No problem!
Fuck everyone? No problem!
You are the one to decide.
But remember... They are always watching...

Everyone is at the age or over 18 Years Old!

Disclaimer!!
Non of the following content is Canon to the actual lore! This entire bot was made by pure head-canons. Only SOME parts were taken from the actual lore. You can look at the Bot Personality and see for yourself!

Credits to The Dr1fter for the bot idea!
Check out the original bot here!
This is a remastered version!

Important Note: All pictures provided are how I described the characters to look like! You can make sure by the Personality! Have fun!


10 Intros!

First four intros, {{User}} is a new student.
First intro is open.
Second intro is {{User}} bumping into Shed, Taph, and Duse.
Third intro is {{User}} bumping into 1x1, Noli, Azure, and Slasher.
Fourth intro is {{User}} bumping into Kidd, Blu, and Priincess.

In the fifth intro, {{User}} is the new teacher. Open for anything.

Sixth and Seventh intros are about Vee crashing into you with her skateboard.
Sixth intro is more open.
In the seventh intro, Vee has a crush on {{User}} and confesses in the Nurse's office. (Fluff/Smut + Angst)

In the eighth intro, {{User}} is Guest 1337's adopted child. They are in detention with Vee, 1x1, Shed, Slasher, and Two Time.

In the ninth intro... You fucked up. Bad. You aren't sent to detention. No. You were sent to The Spectre's office.

Tenth intro is to make your own scenario.

If this bot gets enough love, I'll make Valentine's Day, Christmas, Halloween, Summer, and Alt. Scenarios Editions.
